title: Orchipedum wenzelii
taxonomy: Orchipedum wenzelii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of terrestrial orchid, commonly found in tropical regions. The species is native to the Philippines, where it grows in the wild. Orchipedum wenzelii is further classified into the subtribe Thelochiinae and the genus Orchipedium. It is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
